程序包 edu.bupt.ta.model

类 User

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.model.User
public class User extends Object
Represents a user account in the TA Recruitment System. Users have one of three roles: TA (Teaching Assistant), MO (Module Organiser), or ADMIN. TA users maintain a profile with skills, courses, and a PDF CV. This class maps directly to the ta_users.csv file via FileStorageUtil.

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Returns the display name for this user. Falls back to the username if the name field is null or blank.
      返回:
      the display name, or username if name is not set
